'''Tasjon''' was a location on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] that hosted an important [[Tasjon swoop race|annual swoop race]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="HNN" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|54|sports/1352_1.html|Ominaz Keeps Top Ranking}} is set on the date 13:5:2, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> this [[Swoop racing/Legends|race]] was won by [[Ignar Ominaz]] and Tasjon was the origin of a [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] article that broadcast his victory.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tasjon was mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 54|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #44'']], an [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News (original website)|website]] issue<ref name="HNN" /> published on [[May 2]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN54 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6682683|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-05-02|time=5:53 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref> [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]] wrote the site content.<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
